projects.name: AlbionPacketExplorer (APX)
projects.blurb: Cross-platform desktop tool that captures Albion Online network traffic live and decodes every packet, for reverse-engineering the game protocol.
projects.summary: Captures Albion Onlineâ€™s Photon traffic off the wire (or loads saved captures) and decodes every event, request, and response. Includes a code aggregator, a filterable packet list, a per-packet param grid with a curated schema and item-name resolution, request/response correlation with field diffing, and constructor-scaffolding export. Built in C# with Avalonia; auto-updates via Velopack on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

projects.name: WOS - Java App
projects.blurb: Automation tool for Whiteout Survival: a Java app that drives Android emulators to run the game.
projects.summary: WOS Bot automates Whiteout Survival by controlling Android emulators from a Java application. Maintained by LuluStudio. Note: automating gameplay may violate the gameâ€™s terms of service; use at your own risk.

projects.name: GitRekt
projects.blurb: Advanced automation bot for Whiteout Survival: resource management, combat, city upgrades, and alliance tasks.
projects.summary: GitRekt automates repetitive Whiteout Survival tasks so players can focus on strategy: resource management, combat, city upgrades, and alliance tasks. Runs on Android (no root) and is optimized for LDPlayer to drive multiple instances at once. Note: automating gameplay may violate the gameâ€™s terms of service; use at your own risk.

projects.name: SkatMate
projects.blurb: Tax helper for Denmark: calculators and guides for non-Danish residents filing via skat.dk.
projects.summary: SkatMate helps non-Danish residents navigate the Danish tax system with calculators and plain-language guides for filing via skat.dk. In early development.

projects.name: OpenToWork
projects.blurb: Self-hosted AI job-application system: scrapes job portals, scores fit against a candidate profile, tailors CVs and cover letters, and tracks applications â€” driven by Claude Code.
projects.summary: OpenToWork runs the whole job hunt as a pipeline: it scrapes five job portals, ranks and enriches postings against a candidate profile, then drives a headless Claude Code pipeline that evaluates fit, drafts tailored LaTeX CVs and cover letters, and prepares interview talking points. A Bun + SQLite web app serves the dashboard: matches, an application tracker and kanban, company and market intelligence, in-browser profile onboarding, a PDF viewer with .tex editor, and usage analytics. Multi-user behind a login gate; ships as a single Docker container.

bots.name: AO-Butler
bots.blurb: General-purpose Albion Online Discord bot: item lookups, live market prices, crafting bonuses, and guild utilities.
bots.summary: A Python (discord.py) Discord bot that gives Albion Online players real-time info: item lookup, live market prices, crafting and refining bonuses, city-specific stats, and guild/player utilities. Reuses Albion data dumps and methods from AlbionOnline-StatisticsAnalysis. Self-hosted via Docker (Unraid).

bots.name: AO-Micar
bots.blurb: Discord guild app for the MICAR Albion Online guild: objective tracking, black-zone map data, and guild utilities.
bots.summary: A Node.js Discord bot for running the MICAR Albion Online guild. Provides objective tracking, black-zone map and zone data (with /objective autocomplete), and guild utilities. CI builds a Docker image to GHCR; self-hosted on Unraid with Watchtower auto-updates.

bots.name: TimeKeeper
bots.blurb: TimeKeeper: a lightweight Discord bot that tracks each memberâ€™s UTC offset and shows local times across the server.
bots.summary: TimeKeeper is a minimal Node.js Discord bot. Members set their UTC offset; slash commands show their local time and list saved offsets. Stores data in SQLite/JSON. Self-hostable via Docker with a persistent data volume.

bots.name: GitRekt - Discord
bots.blurb: Whiteout Survival Discord bot: smart troop-training calculators, event stats with OCR, and guild utilities.
bots.summary: A feature-rich Whiteout Survival Discord bot built around a smart calculation system. The /train_troops modal computes total training time, growth-skill time, and effective capacity from your base capacity, training speed, troop tier, and any buffs. It also covers Bear-event statistics (with OCR), heal stats, golden keys, SvS, and other guild utilities. Python (discord.py); work in progress.
